name: python3-pyyaml-env-tag
title: python3-pyyaml-env-tag
summary: Custom YAML tag for referencing environment variables (Python3 version)
description:
Custom YAML tag for referencing environment variables (Python3 version)
This library is the Python port of yaml-env-tag, a Ruby library to use
referenced environment variables within YAML files.
.
This package contains the Python 3 version of the library.
